Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Complete inventory report system with professional PDF export

## Problem
Inventory print feature was showing database IDs instead of readable names:
- Category column displayed UUIDs like "cmgkntisx0007o7w0ym95j6p9"
- Supplier information showed IDs instead of names
- Missing critical fields: material, purity, weight, description, location
- Basic HTML print with minimal information

## Solution

### 1. Fixed Product Data Transformation
- Updated Product interface to include categoryName and supplierName fields
- Modified transformBackendToFrontend to extract display names from backend
- Backend returns category: {id, name} but transformation only used ID
- Now stores both ID (for operations) and name (for display)

### 2. Created Professional PDF Report Generator
**File**: src/utils/inventoryReportGenerator.ts

Features:
- Landscape orientation for better table layout
- Comprehensive columns:
  * Product Name
  * SKU
  * Category (name, not ID)
  * Supplier (name, not ID)
  * Material
  * Purity/Karat
  * Weight
  * Price
  * Cost
  * Quantity
  * Stock Status (color-coded)
  * Location
- Summary statistics at top:
  * Total Items
  * Total Value
  * Low Stock Count
  * Out of Stock Count
- Color-coded stock status:
  * Red: Out of Stock
  * Orange: Low Stock
  * Green: In Stock
- Professional header with store branding
- Auto-generated filename with date

### 3. Updated Inventory Page
- Replaced simple HTML print with professional PDF generator
- Added proper type conversions for all fields
- Include all product details in report
- Better error handling with user feedback
- Downloads as "Inventory_Report_YYYY-MM-DD.pdf"

## Technical Changes

Files Modified:
- src/services/productService.ts
  * Added categoryName and supplierName to Product interface
  * Added purity field for jewelry items
  * Updated transformation to extract names from backend objects
  
- src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx
  * Import inventoryReportGenerator utilities
  * Complete rewrite of handlePrint function
  * Map filtered inventory to report format
  * Calculate statistics (total value, low stock, out of stock)
  * Generate professional PDF with all details

Files Created:
- src/utils/inventoryReportGenerator.ts
  * generateInventoryReportPDF function
  * downloadInventoryReport function
  * previewInventoryReport function
  * getInventoryReportBlob function
  * Comprehensive TypeScript interfaces

## Impact

Before:
- Categories showed as: cmgkntisx0007o7w0ym95j6p9
- Only 6 columns (Name, SKU, Category ID, Price, Cost, Qty)
- Basic HTML print
- No professional formatting

After:
- Categories show as: "Rings", "Necklaces", "Bracelets"
- 12 comprehensive columns with all product details
- Professional landscape PDF with branding
- Color-coded stock status
- Summary statistics
- Downloadable PDF file

## Testing
- Tested with existing inventory data
- Verified category names display correctly
- Confirmed all fields populate properly
- Validated PDF generation and download

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add intelligent CSV import system for inventory management

## Problem
Basic CSV upload required exact column matching and had no error handling:
- No column detection - had to match exact header names
- No validation - imported invalid data
- No preview - users couldn''t see what would be imported
- Missing fields - only supported 7 basic columns
- No error reporting - silently failed on bad data

## Solution: Intelligent CSV Import System

### 1. Smart CSV Parser
**File**: src/utils/intelligentCSVParser.ts

Features:
- **Automatic column detection** with 50+ name variations
  * Recognizes: "name", "product name", "item", "title"
  * Recognizes: "sku", "product code", "item code"
  * Recognizes: "price", "selling price", "retail price"
  * And many more variations for all fields
- **Flexible parsing** handles different CSV formats
- **Data validation** checks required fields and data types
- **Error reporting** provides detailed error messages
- **Smart type conversion** (numbers, decimals, text)
- **Handles quoted fields** and special characters

Supported Fields (14 total):
- name, sku, category, supplier
- material, purity, weight
- price, cost, quantity, threshold
- description, location, barcode

Column Variations Examples:
- Price: "price", "selling price", "sell price", "retail price"
- Quantity: "quantity", "qty", "stock", "stock quantity"
- Threshold: "threshold", "min stock", "reorder level"

### 2. Import Preview Dialog
**File**: src/components/inventory/CSVImportDialog.tsx

Features:
- **Preview before import** - see first 5 items
- **Statistics dashboard**:
  * Total rows processed
  * Valid rows (green badge)
  * Invalid rows (red badge)
- **Detected columns display** shows which columns were found
- **Error list** shows validation errors with row numbers
- **Download template button** for incorrect formats
- **Cancel/Confirm** workflow

### 3. Enhanced CSV Export
Updated CSV download to include ALL 14 fields (was only 7)

New fields in export:
- Supplier name
- Material type
- Purity/Karat
- Weight
- Description
- Location
- Barcode

### 4. Integration
**File**: src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx

Changes:
- Replaced basic upload with intelligent parser
- Added preview dialog integration
- Enhanced error handling
- Better user feedback
- Batch import with progress tracking

## How It Works

### Upload Flow:
1. User clicks Upload CSV button
2. Selects CSV file
3. **System intelligently parses** and detects columns
4. **Preview dialog shows**:
   - Statistics (total, valid, invalid)
   - Detected columns
   - First 5 items preview
   - Any errors found
5. User reviews and confirms
6. Items imported to database
7. Success/failure feedback

### Intelligence Features:

**Column Detection:**
```csv
# All these work automatically:
product,sku,price,qty          ✓
Name,SKU,Selling Price,Quantity ✓
item,product code,cost,stock    ✓
```

**Flexible Format:**
```csv
# With currency symbols
Name,SKU,Price
Ring,JWL-001,£1200.00  ✓

# With commas
Gold Ring,"JWL-001","1,200.00"  ✓

# Mixed formats
"Ring, Gold",JWL-001,1200  ✓
```

**Validation:**
- Requires: name, sku, price, quantity
- Validates: price > 0, quantity >= 0
- Handles: missing optional fields gracefully

**Error Reporting:**
```
Row 5: Valid price is required (Field: price)
Row 12: Product name is required (Field: name)
Row 18: SKU is required (Field: sku)
```

## Template Generation

Users can download a CSV template with example data:
```csv
name,sku,category,supplier,material,purity,weight,price,cost,quantity,threshold,description,location,barcode
Gold Diamond Ring,JWL-RING-001,Rings,ABC Suppliers,GOLD,18K,5.5,1200.00,500.00,10,3,"Beautiful 18K gold ring",Shelf A1,1234567890123
```

## Benefits

**For Users:**
- ✅ No need to match exact column names
- ✅ See what will be imported before confirming
- ✅ Clear error messages
- ✅ Template download for easy setup
- ✅ Import from any CSV format

**For Business:**
- ✅ Reduces import errors
- ✅ Saves time (no manual formatting)
- ✅ Better data validation
- ✅ Comprehensive field support

## Technical Details

**Parser Algorithm:**
1. Normalize headers (lowercase, remove special chars)
2. Match against 50+ variations
3. Parse rows with proper quote handling
4. Validate each row independently
5. Collect all errors
6. Return structured result

**Validation Rules:**
- Name: Required, non-empty string
- SKU: Required, non-empty string
- Price: Required, number > 0
- Quantity: Required, number >= 0
- Others: Optional, type-validated

**Error Handling:**
- File read errors
- Invalid CSV format
- Missing required columns
- Invalid data types
- Empty rows (skipped)
- Malformed quotes

## Files Changed

Created:
- src/utils/intelligentCSVParser.ts (450 lines)
- src/components/inventory/CSVImportDialog.tsx (250 lines)

Modified:
- src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx
  * Added intelligent CSV parsing
  * Enhanced CSV export (7 → 14 fields)
  * Added preview dialog integration

## Testing

Tested with:
- ✓ Standard format CSV
- ✓ Different column names
- ✓ Missing optional fields
- ✓ Invalid data (proper error handling)
- ✓ Special characters and quotes
- ✓ Large files (100+ items)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
